productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Ballet School Black Tops
description: Composition Black top made of 100% cotton, with a round neck, pleated magyar sleeves and graphic print with metallic embellishments on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess dance away to glory in this cute top from doodle. The graphic print adds an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts or skirts and sandals to complete her look.
